content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Attorneys
    Mickey
    Gina
    John G.
    Rich E.
    Jay
    Dawn
    John K.

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Ken

Date: Dec. 8, 1976

Subject: Applicable law for Statements of Economic Interests with a closing date prior to January 1, 1977.

It has been decided that any Statement of Economic Interests which has a closing date earlier than January 1, 1977, should be filed in accordance with the provisions of the Political Reform Act in effect during 1976. Accordingly, even though such Statements will be filed after January 1, 1977, the amendments to the Act which become effective on January 1, 1977, will not be applicable to the information which must be disclosed. For example, it will be necessary on such Statements to disclose all income, not only income in the jurisdiction.

This information has been communicated to State legislators, and to Chris Ames of the Attorney General's Office so that he can reiterate it to State and regional coastal commissioners. Other individuals affected by this decision should be instructed accordingly.

KF:jo

The image you provided is mostly blank, with very faint and mostly illegible text at the top. There are two small circles or dots near the top of the page. If there is any additional content or context that you would like to discuss, please provide more details or another image.
